headline: Is Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Cheap After Its Pullback Or Already Fairly Valued?
summary: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) has drawn fresh attention after appearing on Zacks.com’s list of most searched stocks, putting its current Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and changing earnings estimates in sharper focus for investors. See our latest analysis for Builders FirstSource. At a latest share price of $75.16, Builders FirstSource has seen short term pressure, with the 7 day share price return down 4.16% and the 90 day share price return down 11.71%. headline: LOW Paid Holders $47 Bil While The Stock Went Nowhere
summary: The home improvement giant showered its owners with cash, yet the stock barely budged. Here’s what shareholders actually got, and what has to happen next for the trade to make sense.
